title: ScaryGranny!
description: Mod add new mob in minecraft - Graanny.
body:
# Granny Mod
A mod that adds new mob - Granny. You can spawn it using a craftable totem.




Items:

### Totem of granny


![Using for spawn granny](https://i.ibb.co/QHRtyC6/Screenshot-2024-02-23-191854.png)

Using for spawn granny



### Ashes

![Using for craft granny totem](https://i.ibb.co/Xp06dj0/Screenshot-2024-02-23-191557.png)

Using for craft granny totem



### Ashes diamond

![ using for craft granny totem](https://i.ibb.co/qs4C6Sp/Screenshot-2024-02-23-191654.png)

Using for craft granny totem



### Granny Bat

![Dropped by Granny, deals 10 damage](https://i.ibb.co/Fbn0SKN/Screenshot-2024-02-23-191810.png)

Dropped by Granny, deals 10 damage



### Granny

![ Granny](https://i.ibb.co/ZgVXg14/Screenshot-2024-02-23-192146.png)


Questions & Answers about the Mod.

### Q: How i can find ashes?
A: You can find ashes in desert pyramids or craft it yourself


### Q: How i can spawn granny?
A: You can craft granny totem and spawn granny with right-click
### Q: Does this modification work on the server?
A: This modification works on the server only if it also works on the client


### Q: I have a suggestion for the mod
A: Post a comment about your suggestion in the 'Comments' Tab

### Q: Can I use your mod for a modpack?
A: Yes, you may add this mod to any Modpack. Both for Personal and Commercial use.

### Q: I found a bug, how do I report it?
A: Post a comment about the bug in the 'Comments' Tab

### Q: I have a suggestion for the mod
A: Post a comment about your suggestion in the 'Comments' Tab

### Q: My question isn't answered here
A: Post your question in the 'Comments' Tab and I'll reply to it answering
